Eligibility1: All full-time employees are eligible for leave benefits after completing 90 days of continuous service. Part-time employees may be eligible for certain types of leave on a pro-rata basis. Please consult the full HR handbook for specific details regarding part-time eligibility.
track: Track and manage all employee leave requests.
Vacation1: Accrued annually for rest and recreation.
Sick1: For personal illness or injury, or to care for a sick family member.
Personal1: For personal matters that require absence from work.
Bereavement1: Provided in the unfortunate event of a death in the immediate family.
Parental1: For new parents, including maternity, paternity, and adoption leave.
Request1: All leave requests must be submitted through this HR portal at least two weeks in advance for planned leaves (e.g., vacation). For unforeseen circumstances like sick leave, employees must notify their manager as soon as possible and submit a formal request upon their return. All requests are subject to manager approval and business needs.
Request2: This is a brief overview. For a comprehensive understanding of the leave policy, including accrual rates and specific conditions, please refer to the official company policy document available on the employee intranet.
